digital services.</p><p></p>\n<p></p><p><br></p><b>Responsibilities</b><ul><li>Develop and deliver end-to-end features using React, TypeScript, and .NET/C#</li><li>Build and maintain scalable, secure, rota</li></ul><p><br></p><b>Requirements</b><ul><li>Strong experience with React, TypeScript, and .NET/C#</li><li>Experience building RESTful APIs and full stack applications</li><li>Solid DevOps, and DevOps practices</li><li>Hands-on experience with unit and integration testing, with exposure to UI/E2E or contract testing</li><li>Understanding of automation and continuous delivery
